data.biography:
Jeffrey DeMunn (born April 25, 1947) is an American theatre, film and television actor. He is known as a favorite of director Frank Darabont, who has cast him in all four of his films, The Green Mile, The Shawshank Redemption, The Majestic and The Mist (he also appeared in the 1988 remake of The Blob, which Darabont co-wrote). He also has an extensive television résumé, appearing in shows such as Kojak, Law & Order, and two of its spin-offs, SVU and Trial by Jury.

He has been involved in more Stephen King adaptations than any other actor. He has acted in film adaptations of Rita Hayworth and Shawshank Redemption, The Green Mile, The Mist and the T.V. miniseries Storm of the Century. He also narrated the audiobooks for Dreamcatcher and The Colorado Kid.

In 1995, he won a CableACE Award as Best Supporting Actor in a Movie or Miniseries for his portrayal of serial killer Andrei Chikatilo in the HBO film Citizen X.
data.name: Jeffrey DeMunn

data.biography:
杰弗里·德蒙（Jeffrey DeMunn，1947年4月25日-），美国戏剧、电影和电视演员。他被称为导演弗兰克·达拉邦特的最爱，弗兰克·达拉邦特在他的所有四部电影中都出演了他，《绿英里》、《肖申克的救赎》、《雄伟》和《迷雾》（他还出现在 1988 年翻拍的《斑点》中，达拉邦特与人合著）。他还拥有丰富的电视履历，出现在《Kojak》、《法律与秩序》等节目中，以及其两部衍生剧《SVU》和《陪审团审判》等节目中。

他参与的斯蒂芬·金改编作品比其他任何演员都多。他曾出演过《丽塔·海华斯》和《肖申克的救赎》、《绿英里》、《迷雾》和电视迷你剧《世纪风暴》的电影改编。他还为《捕梦网》和《科罗拉多小子》讲述了有声读物。

1995 年，他因在 HBO 电影《公民 X》中饰演连环杀手安德烈·奇卡蒂洛而获得 CableACE 电影或迷你剧最佳男配角奖。
data.name: 杰弗里·德蒙

data.biography:
傑弗裏·德蒙（Jeffrey DeMunn，1947 年 4 月 25 日-），美國戲劇、電影和電視演員。他被稱為導演弗蘭克·達拉邦特的最愛，弗蘭克·達拉邦特在他的所有四部電影中都出演了他，《綠英裏》、《月黑高飛》、《雄偉》和《霧地異煞》（他還出現在 1988 年翻拍的《斑點》中，達拉邦特與人合著）。他還擁有豐富的電視履歷，出現在《Kojak》、《法律與秩序》等節目中，以及其兩部衍生劇《SVU》和《陪審團審判》等節目中。

他參與的斯蒂芬·金改編作品比其他任何演員都多。他曾出演過《麗塔·海華斯》和《月黑高飛》、《綠英裏》、《霧地異煞》和電視迷你劇《世紀風暴》的電影改編。他還為《漏網之靈》和《科羅拉多小子》講述了有聲讀物。

1995 年，他因在 HBO 電影《公民 X》中飾演聯環殺手安德烈·奇卡蒂洛而獲得 CableACE 電影或迷你劇最佳男配角獎。
data.name: 傑弗裏·德蒙

data.biography:
Jeffrey DeMunn, 25 Nisan 1947 tarihinde Buffalo, New York'ta dünyaya gelmiştir. Union College'dan İngiliz Edebiyatı diplomasıyla mezun olduktan sonra oyunculuk eğitimini İngiltere'deki prestijli Bristol Old Vic Theatre School'da tamamlayan DeMunn, kariyerine İngiltere'de Kraliyet Shakespeare Topluluğu ile sahne alarak başladı. ABD'ye döndüğünde tiyatro kariyerine ağırlık verdi ve 1983 yapımı "K2" oyunundaki performansıyla En İyi Erkek Oyuncu dalında Tony Ödülü'ne aday gösterilerek sahnedeki yeteneğini kanıtladı.

Sinema dünyasında ise kariyerini en çok şekillendiren unsur, yönetmen Frank Darabont ile kurduğu sarsılmaz işbirliğidir. DeMunn, Darabont'un yönettiği neredeyse tüm önemli projelerde yer alarak yönetmenin vazgeçilmez oyuncularından biri olmuştur. Bu ortaklık, sinema tarihinin en sevilen filmlerinden "Esaretin Bedeli" (The Shawshank Redemption) (1994) filmindeki savcı rolüyle dikkat çekti. Ardından, bir başka Stephen King uyarlaması olan "Yeşil Yol" (The Green Mile) (1999) filminde sempatik gardiyan Harry Terwilliger karakterine hayat verdi. Darabont ile işbirliği "The Majestic" (2001) ve korku-gerilim türündeki "Öldüren Sis" (The Mist) (2007) filmleriyle devam etti. Ayrıca 1980'lerde "The Hitcher" (1986) ve "The Blob" (1988) gibi kült korku filmlerinde de akılda kalıcı roller üstlendi.

Televizyon kariyerinde de oldukça etkileyici bir grafik çizen DeMunn, 1995 yapımı HBO filmi "Citizen X"te canlandırdığı seri katil Andrei Chikatilo rolüyle eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı ve bu performansıyla Primetime Emmy Ödülü'ne aday gösterildi. Ancak modern izleyici kitlesi tarafından küresel çapta tanınmasını sağlayan rol, yine Frank Darabont tarafından geliştirilen fenomen dizi "The Walking Dead"in (2010-2012) ilk iki sezonunda canlandırdığı Dale Horvath karakteridir. Grubun ahlaki pusulası olan bu karakterle büyük bir hayran kitlesi edindi. Diziden ayrıldıktan sonra, "Mob City"de rol aldı ve özellikle uzun soluklu "Billions" (2016-2023) dizisindeki zengin, güçlü ve manipülatif baba figürü Charles Rhoades Sr. rolüyle kariyerinde yeni bir zirve yakaladı. Coen Kardeşler'in "Aramızda Casus Var" (Burn After Reading) (2008) gibi filmlerinde de yer alan Jeffrey DeMunn, tiyatro kökenli disiplini ve çok yönlü oyunculuğuyla Amerikan sinemasının en güvenilir karakter oyuncularından biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.

Laura Mennell (18 de abril de 1980) es una actriz canadiense conocida por sus papeles en Thirteen Ghosts, Alphas, Haven, Loudermilk, The Man in the High Castle y Watchmen. En 2011/2012 Mennell coprotagonizó la serie de televisión de ciencia ficción Alphas, apareció como Charlotte Cross en la quinta temporada de la serie SyFy Haven.

Aline Adriana Küppenheim Gualtieri (born 10 August 1969) is a Chilean actress. She has appeared in forty films and television series since 1991.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
data.name: Aline Küppenheim

data.biography: Ayeshah Rose is a New Zealand-born Australian actress, writer, philanthropist and director of Equilibri Productions. Ayeshah began acting, writing and painting at a young age to pass time growing up in rural Queensland. It was a world of imagination and visual art that allowed her to escape and evolve in the midst of a confusing, mixed cultural upbringing. Performing arts were not as accessible, it wasn't until she was accepted into a Sydney acting school she merged into a love for film and television.
data.name: Ayeshah Rose

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia. Sonja Sohn is an American actress and community activist. She is best known for her role as Detective Kima Greggs on the hit HBO drama The Wire, which has led to her current work as the leader of the Baltimore community initiative ReWired for Change.  She is currently starring as Detective Samantha Baker on the ABC drama series Body of Proof.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Sonja Sohn, licensed under CC-BY-SA,full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Sonja Sohn

data.biography: 索尼娅·索恩（Sonja Sohn）是美国女演员和社区活动家。她最出名的是她在 HBO 热播剧 The Wire 中饰演侦探 Kima Greggs，这导致她目前担任巴尔的摩社区倡议 ReWired for Change 的负责人。她目前在 ABC 电视剧《证据之躯》中饰演侦探萨曼莎·贝克。
data.name: 索尼娅·索恩

data.biography: 宋雅·孫（Sonja Sohn）是美國女演員和社區活動家。她最出名的是她在 HBO 熱播劇 The Wire 中飾演偵探 Kima Greggs，這導致她目前擔任巴爾的摩社區倡議 ReWired for Change 的負責人。她目前在 ABC 電視劇《證據之軀》中飾演偵探薩曼莎·貝克。
data.name: 宋雅·孫
Cộng Đồng Vui Tính
data.overview: Bị phát hiện làm giả bằng luật, Jeff Winger trở lại trường đại học và thành lập một nhóm học toàn những người lạc quẻ.

data.biography: Indira Anne Varma is an English stage and screen actress. She was a member of Musical Youth Theatre Company and graduated from the Royal Academy of Dramatic Art (RADA) in London, in 1995. Her film debut and first major role was in Kama Sutra: A Tale of Love. She has gone on to appear in the television series The Canterbury Tales, Rome, Luther, Human Target, and Game of Thrones (as Ellaria Sand).
data.name: Indira Varma
インディラ・ヴァルマ

data.biography: Indira Anne Varma jest angielską aktorką teatralną i filmową. Była członkinią Musical Youth Theatre Company i ukończyła Royal Academy of Dramatic Art (RADA) w Londynie w 1995 roku. Jej debiutem filmowym i pierwszą główną rolą był film Kama Sutra: A Tale of Love. Następnie wystąpiła w serialach telewizyjnych The Canterbury Tales, Rome, Luther, Human Target i Game of Thrones (jako Ellaria Sand).
